name: GPT Infraprojects Limited
summary: GPT Infraprojects Limited, together with its subsidiaries, engages in the execution of civil infrastructure projects in India and internationally. It operates in two segments, Infrastructure and Concrete Sleepers. The company constructs roads, bridges, airports, and irrigation and railway systems, as well as power, urban transit, industrial, and civil aviation infrastructure. It also manufactures and sells monoblock and PSC sleepers for various track applications, including monoblock sleepers for broad, cape, and dual gauges, as well as line sleepers, bridge deck sleepers, and level crossing and switch expansion joints. GPT Infraprojects Limited was incorporated in 1980 and is headquartered in Kolkata, India.
